text: I feel a rush of quiet anticipation, looking into this futuristic room filled with glowing lights and the words 'R+D.' Inside, surrounded by ideas and soft illuminations, I sense the pulse of curiosity and human ingenuity. There is something electric about this space—a promise of discovery, creativity, and the unknown. I stand at the threshold of possibility, eager to explore and reflect on the dance between knowledge, imagination, and the technology that shapes our shared future.
